content.query:
SELECT
cst.id as ProspectID
,lds.id as LeadID
,cst.Address1
,cst.City
,cst.Zip
,cst.[State]
,case when lds.dsp_id = 'Sale' then 'Sale' else 'No Sale' end as Disposition
,lds.EntryDate
,lds.gsa as GrossSaleAmount
,zip.[Latitude] as ZipLatitude
,zip.[Longitude] as ZipLongitude
 FROM 
 [ODS].[LP_RTW_cst_Customers] cst
 ,[ODS].[LP_RTW_lds_Leads] lds
 ,[ODS].[MKTDATA_ZIP_CODES_DB_DELUXE_BUSINESS] zip
 where
 lds.cst_id = cst.id
and cst.Zip = zip.[ZipCode]
and zip.PrimaryRecord = 'P'
